name: agevolt-helpdesk
description: AgeVolt Helpdesk doplnok pre podporu zakaznikov, internu triage, incidenty, servisne postupy, OCPP log export, WiseCloud touchpoint operacie a remote start/stop nabijania cez AgeVolt MCP.

interface.longDescription: AgeVolt Helpdesk doplnok pre Codex. Pomaha pri podpore zakaznikov, triedeni poziadaviek, priprave odpovedi, analyzovani incidentov, tvorbe internych servisnych postupov, exporte OCPP logov zo staging Influxu, WiseCloud touchpoint operaciach a bezpecnom remote starte alebo stope nabijania na touchpointe cez AgeVolt MCP endpoint.
interface.defaultPrompt: Pomoz s AgeVolt helpdesk poziadavkou. Pri operacnych write akciach pouzi MCP preview/confirm/execute workflow a neobchadzaj ho priamym HTTP, SQL ani token fallbackom.
